description: Expand APES from 12 agents (6 clusters) to 64 agents (8 clusters) with inter-agent communication, message bus, mailbox system, task claiming, team system, anti-hallucination layer, and cluster-grouped animation.

userStories.title: Create agent-definitions.js with 64 agent definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a separate file with all 64 agent definitions so the registry can be refactored to be data-driven.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/agents/agent-definitions.js exporting getDefaultAgents() and getDefaultClusters()
getDefaultClusters() returns 8 clusters with id, name, description
getDefaultAgents() returns 64 agents with id, role, cluster, skills, complexitySupported, confidenceScore, avgExecutionTime

userStories.title: Modify registry.js to use agent-definitions.js
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the registry to import from agent-definitions.js instead of hardcoded definitions.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/agents/registry.js to import getDefaultAgents and getDefaultClusters
Replace initializeDefaults() body to use imported functions

userStories.title: Create message-bus.js communication subsystem
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a central message bus for inter-agent communication.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement publish, subscribe, unsubscribe, getMessages, acknowledge, reject methods
Message schema includes id, type, fromAgentId, toAgentId, taskId, channel, confidence, output, timestamp, status

userStories.title: Create message-validator.js for schema validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need message validation to ensure messages conform to the schema.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement validate() returning { valid: boolean, errors: string[] }
Implement sanitize() to normalize and fill defaults

userStories.title: Create mailbox.js for per-agent message queues
userStories.description: As a developer, I need per-agent mailbox queues for direct messaging.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement receive, read, readByType, send, getInbox, clear methods

userStories.title: Create mailbox-store.js for file-backed persistence
userStories.description: As a developer, I need mailbox persistence to disk for team collaboration.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement save, load, clear, listAgents methods

userStories.title: Create task-claimer.js with file-lock based claiming
userStories.description: As a developer, I need autonomous task claiming with file locking for distributed agent coordination.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement postTask, claimTask, getAvailableTasks, completeTask, releaseTask, getClaimedTasks
Use atomic rename for file-lock claiming

userStories.title: Create team-manager.js for team lifecycle management
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a team manager to create, spawn, assign tasks, and shutdown teams.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement create, spawn, assign, list, getTeam, message, broadcast, shutdown, cleanup methods
TeamConfig structure includes id, name, leadAgent, members, cluster, status, createdAt

userStories.title: Create team-store.js for team persistence
userStories.description: As a developer, I need team configuration persistence to disk.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement save, load, listTeams, delete static methods

userStories.title: Create hallucination-detector.js for output validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need hallucination detection to validate LLM outputs before they're accepted.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement evaluate, estimateConfidence, checkConsistency, shouldEscalate methods
Validation pipeline: confidence check, consistency check, constraint enforcement, escalation decision

userStories.title: Create constraint-enforcer.js for rule validation
userStories.description: As a developer, I need constraint enforcement to validate outputs against task requirements.
acceptanceCriteria: Default rules: non_empty_output, no_placeholder_text, reasonable_length, task_reference

userStories.title: Create conflict-resolver.js for disagreement resolution
userStories.description: As a developer, I need conflict resolution to handle disagreements between multiple agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement detect, openConflict, vote, resolve, getResolution methods
Resolution algorithms: consensus vote, arbitration, highest_confidence

userStories.title: Create cluster-animation.js for grouped agent display
userStories.description: As a user, I want agents displayed in collapsible cluster groups so the UI remains readable with 64 agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Agents grouped by cluster, collapsible view
Only active clusters are expanded by default

userStories.title: Update intent-classifier.js to support 8 clusters
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the intent classifier to route to the new 8 clusters.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/orchestration/intent-classifier.js to add 2 new intent types (memory, safety)
Update cluster mappings to use 8 cluster IDs

userStories.title: Update complexity-scorer.js for higher agent caps
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the complexity scorer to allow up to 24 agents for complex tasks.

userStories.title: Update spawner.js to support 24 agents and multi-cluster
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the agent spawner to select up to 24 agents for complex tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/agents/spawner.js selectAgents to return up to 24 agents
Update allocate to consider multiple clusters

userStories.title: Integrate message bus with DAG scheduler
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the DAG scheduler to publish task results to the message bus.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/execution/dag-scheduler.js to publish task_output messages
After task completes, publish to task:{taskId} channel

userStories.title: Wire anti-hallucination layer into orchestrator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the orchestrator to validate outputs through the hallucination detector.
acceptanceCriteria: After evaluation, run hallucination validation on results
Route to review or consensus based on decision

userStories.title: Integrate conflict resolver with result aggregator
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the result aggregator to detect and resolve conflicts between agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Detect multi-agent outputs for same task

userStories.title: Create team-command.js for CLI /team subcommand
userStories.description: As a user, I need a /team CLI command to manage teams interactively.
acceptanceCriteria: Subcommands: create, spawn, assign, list, message, shutdown, cleanup, help

userStories.title: Integrate /team command into CLI
userStories.description: As a user, I need to access team management from the CLI.

userStories.title: Update base-provider.js with 64 role system prompts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need all 64 agent roles to have appropriate system prompts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add prompts for all 64 agent roles
Each prompt is 1-2 sentences describing the role

userStories.title: Update worker-pool.js for increased concurrency
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the worker pool to support up to 16 concurrent workers.

userStories.title: Update renderer.js for 8 clusters and 64 agents
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the terminal renderer to handle the expanded agent count.
